name: HWR_ISSUE_KEY_GT
description: This is a global temporary table to help with in queries on the HWR_ISSUE_B table.

columns.Name: SOURCE_ID
columns.Comments: This is the id of the source on the HWR_SOURCE_B table.

columns.Name: CONTROL_KEY
columns.Comments: This is the control_key on the HWR_REP_CONTROL_B table.

columns.Name: SRC_POST_ID
columns.Comments: This is the source post id for the post.
